title: Profile Definition
description: Schema for a profile definition that groups multiple tweak IDs.

description.description: What this profile does and who it's for.

target_audience.description: Who this profile is intended for.

risk_level.description: Aggregate risk level of all tweaks in this profile.

tweak_ids.description: Ordered list of tweak IDs to apply sequentially.

estimated_restart_required.description: Whether any tweak in this profile requires a restart.

vanguard_compatible.description: Whether all tweaks in this profile are Vanguard-compatible.
